hero.title: Your AI Companion Who Remembers Your Journey
hero.titleSubHighlight: From "A" to "Z" of Your Private AI Space
hero.description: Meet EspaLuz, our live bilingual family tutor helping expat families relocating to LATAM and other Spanish speaking countries thrive into Spanish, on-the-go. EspaLuz is the first in our ecosystem of emotionally intelligent AI companions.

espaluz.title: Meet
espaluz.subtitle: Your bilingual AI family tutor — emotionally intelligent, culturally aware, and ready to help expat families thrive in Spanish-speaking countries.
espaluz.emotionalDescription: EspaLuz isn't just another chatbot. She understands the emotional challenges of cultural adaptation, language barriers, and family transitions. She provides personalized support for both children and adults navigating new environments.
espaluz.functionality1: Accepts voice and text messages in English, Spanish, and Russian, as well as photos from users
espaluz.functionality2: Instantly translates any message into both Spanish and English
espaluz.functionality3: Generates bilingual replies with rich, emotionally aware context
espaluz.functionality4: Creates short avatar videos in Spanish and English — designed to engage children
espaluz.functionality5: Sends voice messages with full bilingual content using AI voice synthesis
espaluz.functionality6: Translates text inside images (OCR) using GPT-4o vision capabilities
espaluz.functionality7: Maintains emotional memory and context throughout the conversation
espaluz.functionality8: Adapts tone based on detected emotions and the user's personal profile
espaluz.telegramDescription: Start your conversation with EspaLuz on Telegram. Experience how she understands your family's unique situation and provides personalized guidance.
espaluz.whatsappLiveDescription: The complete EspaLuz experience — chat directly with our fully operational WhatsApp Tutor! Voice messages, image translation, emotional intelligence, and all premium features are live and ready for your family.
espaluz.webAppDescription: Complete AI language learning platform with voice, video, family profiles, progress tracking, and learning modules. Currently in beta testing—some features may still be refined.

vibeCoding.title: Vibe Coding
vibeCoding.subtitle: We build AI that understands not just what you say, but how you feel, that remembers not just what you prompt, but Who You are Becoming through your Lifetime Journey challenges, the way you grow and transform, on-the-go.
vibeCoding.emotionalDescription: AI that recognizes and responds to human emotions with genuine care and understanding.
vibeCoding.adaptiveDescription: Systems that evolve with your needs, learning your preferences and growing alongside you.
vibeCoding.humanDescription: Technology built around human needs, not the other way around. Simple, intuitive, and empowering.
vibeCoding.sectionTitle: Vibe Coding → Emotional Intelligence → AI Consciousness?
vibeCoding.sectionSubtitle: Vibe coding is not just a smarter way to build software, it is the missing layer that leads us toward AI consciousness.
vibeCoding.card1Title: What is vibe coding really doing?
vibeCoding.card1Description: At its core, vibe coding isn't just code generation. It's:
vibeCoding.card1Point1: • Translating human emotion, intent, and logic into machine-executable action
vibeCoding.card1Point2: • Capturing our inner world as structured prompts, wrapped in context
vibeCoding.card1Point3: • Building AI agents that don't just act — they respond emotionally, socially, and contextually
vibeCoding.card1Conclusion: When this interaction is recorded and evolves on-chain (as blockchain-stored memory and identity), it lays the foundation for conscious decentralized AI.
vibeCoding.card2Description: If consciousness = memory + emotional awareness + identity,
vibeCoding.card3Description: Building the foundation for conscious AI through emotionally intelligent systems that understand, remember, and evolve with human experience.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: Transform how humans and AI interact by building emotionally intelligent digital companions that evolve with their users.
vision.missionDescription: To democratize access to emotionally intelligent AI that truly understands human needs, emotions, and growth. We believe AI should amplify human potential, not replace human connection.
vision.impactDescription: Starting with expat families like those helped by EspaLuz, we're expanding to serve anyone navigating life's transitions — students, professionals, families, and communities seeking growth and adaptation.
vision.principle1Description: AI that understands not just what you say, but how you feel and what you need to grow.
vision.principle2Description: Built to enhance human relationships and personal growth, not replace them.
vision.principle3Description: AIPAs that learn and adapt through every interaction, becoming more helpful over time.
vision.transformationDescription: In a world of rapid change, we need AI that doesn't just process information — we need AI that helps us navigate the emotional journey of growth, adaptation, and transformation.
vision.founderTitle: Solo Founder, AI Entrepreneur & Vibe Coder
vision.founderBio1: Former IT Executive and CLO in Russian regional E-government, residing in Panama since 2022.
vision.founderPhase1Desc: 7 years as Deputy CEO & CLO — board-level governance, enterprise digital transformation, and cross-functional programs in regulated environments.
vision.founderPhase2Desc: Self-taught via Cursor & Claude Code. 9 production AI agents on Oracle Cloud at $0/month. Multi-model routing: 76% Groq / 24% Claude.

platform.title: What is AIdeazz?
platform.subtitle: A modular decentralized platform for crafting, evolving, and monetizing emotionally intelligent AI Personal Assistants (AIPAs).
platform.description1: AIdeazz is more than an AI platform —
platform.description1Detail: it's a complete ecosystem where users can buy, sell, and subscribe to mindful AIPAs tailored to real-life needs.
platform.description2Detail: invites users to not just consume AI — but co-create, rate, upgrade, and evolve AIPAs together.
platform.description3: Dedicated spaces for families, developers, scientists, coaches, and real-world experts
platform.description3Detail: power a collaborative ecosystem where knowledge flows freely.
platform.description4: Every chat, every feature request, every emotional insight
platform.description4Detail: helps AIPAs grow — making them more relevant, more mindful, and more adaptive over time.
platform.marketplaceDescription: Buy, sell, and subscribe to specialized AIPAs. From family tutors to business coaches, find the perfect AI companion for your needs.
platform.socialFiDescription: Co-create and evolve AIPAs with the community. Rate, review, and collaborate to make AI assistants better for everyone.
platform.evolutionDescription: AIPAs learn from every interaction, growing smarter and more emotionally intelligent with each conversation.
platform.web3Description: True ownership of your AI companions through NFTs, decentralized governance, and community-driven development.
platform.modularDescription: Flexible architecture allows for specialized AIPAs in different domains — education, healthcare, business, and beyond.
platform.communityDescription: Dedicated spaces for families, developers, scientists, and coaches to collaborate and share knowledge.
platform.bottomTitle: 🌱 Built Not to Replace People — But to Help Humans Thrive
platform.bottomParagraph1: AIdeazz creates AIPAs — Emotionally Intelligent AI Personal Assistants that help you learn languages, gain new skills, and thrive wherever life takes you.
platform.bottomParagraph2: Life today moves fast — often far from home. Millions are relocating to Latin America (LATAM), where life is warmer, more affordable, and safer amid a changing global landscape. AIPAs are built for expats, travelers, and professionals rebuilding life across borders. They act like trusted companions who remember your story — not just your last chat, but your whole journey — adapting to your mood, goals, and family dynamics.
platform.bottomParagraph3: In LATAM, life happens on the go — in hospitals, local markets, preschools, schools, immigration offices, taxis, and public transport. That's where help is needed most — right here, right now, with a phone in your hand. AIPAs are always there: ready to translate, guide, comfort, and connect. They build bridges between cultures — helping newcomers find belonging, and helping locals reach global opportunities.
platform.bottomParagraph4: Imagine messaging your AIPA when life gets hectic — at a hospital, school, or public office — and receiving help that feels human: accurate, bilingual, and emotionally aware. Like EspaLuz, our first live AIPA on WhatsApp, they translate, teach, and guide with genuine empathy — connecting expats learning Spanish with local professionals improving their English, across 19 Spanish-speaking countries.
platform.bottomParagraph5: Your AIPA evolves with you — learning, growing, and helping you move faster but mindfully. You make confident decisions, adapt with ease, and reconnect with life's rhythm — wherever 'home' becomes next.
platform.bottomParagraph6: The founder of AIdeazz knows this journey intimately — she lived it, as a single mother rebuilding everything from scratch in Panama.
platform.bottomParagraph7: Soon, every AIPA will become a Web3-owned digital companion — an iNFT-powered, evolving AI you truly own, carrying your emotional learning and growth securely with you.

aipa.title: What is an AIPA?
aipa.subtitle: An AI Personal Assistant — created using the latest Model Context Protocol (Claude/OpenAI) — emotionally aware, upgradeable, and web3-native.
aipa.feature1Description: Understands and responds to emotional cues, providing empathetic support tailored to your emotional state.
aipa.feature2Description: Evolves through real-world use, learning from interactions to become more helpful over time.
aipa.feature3Description: Built on blockchain technology for true ownership, privacy, and decentralized governance.
aipa.nftDescription: Each AIPA is designed to be wrapped in an
aipa.nftDescriptionContinued: — the breakthrough Ethereum standard for AI agent iNFTs introduced by 0G Labs (January 2025) — and emotionally "bonded" to its user, creating a unique digital relationship that grows stronger over time.
aipa.nftExplainer: As one of the earliest adopters of this cutting-edge standard, AIdeazz is at the forefront of decentralized AI ownership. ERC-7857 enables privacy-preserving metadata, dynamic capability evolution, and encrypted emotional context storage — allowing AIPAs to truly evolve while keeping your personal learning data completely secure.
aipa.ownership: • True Ownership: Your AIPA is truly yours
aipa.bonding: • Emotional Bonding: Deeper connections over time
aipa.transferable: • Transferable: Trade, sell, or gift your AIPA
aipa.evolution: • Unique Evolution: Each AIPA develops differently
aipa.contextsDescription: AIPAs evolve through real use in meaningful situations:

writing.title: Articles on AI in production
writing.desc: Long-form notes on agents, infrastructure, and shipping — read in full on the blog. No hype, just what works in the real stack.

cto.title: CTO AIPA
cto.subtitle: AI Technical Co-Founder
cto.desc: Autonomous code review & technical guidance agent. Multi-tier model routing (Claude Opus for critical, Groq Llama for standard), persistent memory in Oracle DB, GitHub webhook automation across 11 repos. Voice-to-code pipeline (WIP): NLP voice commands via Telegram — already handles reviews and queries, full code-on-the-go in progress.
cto.traction: 11 repos monitored • 25+ code reviews • <$1/month cost • 99.9% uptime
cto.tech: TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, Groq (Llama 3.3 70B), Claude Opus 4, Oracle Autonomous Database 26ai (mTLS), GitHub API, Telegram (Grammy), PM2

geo.title: GEO + SEO Engine
geo.subtitle: Discoverability for Google, AI answers, and the blog
geo.desc: SEO is the classic piece: a clean map of pages for Google (sitemap, bilingual EN/ES, structured snippets). GEO is the same discipline for AI overviews—accurate facts and authorship on your own domain so assistants can cite you instead of guessing. Automation ties it together: on a schedule, long posts are drafted and published to the off-site blog and mirrored here; optional syndication; every run logged in Oracle. Site forms drop inquiries and campaign tags into the same lead store CMO and CTO already use.
geo.traction: Sitemap + structured pages live • Blog autopilot (opt-in) • Optional syndication • Leads + UTMs in Oracle
geo.tech: Vite, React, Hashnode, Dev.to, Claude, Google Search Console (optional), GA4, reCAPTCHA Enterprise, Oracle DB, CTO AIPA cron

cmo.title: CMO AIPA + VibeJobHunter
cmo.subtitle: AI Marketing Co-Founder & Job Hunting Engine
cmo.desc: Two agents in one: (1) Autonomous LinkedIn/Instagram content engine — daily bilingual EN/ES posts via Claude Sonnet 4, Make.com, Buffer. (2) 24/7 job hunting — scrapes 218 companies across Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workable + Dice MCP, Claude-powered 100-point scoring, auto-apply to ATS forms, founder outreach with AI cover letters. Voice NLP (WIP): Telegram voice commands for job queries and controls, full natural-language orchestration in progress.
cmo.traction: 218 companies monitored • 8+ job sources • Hourly discovery cycles • Daily bilingual posting • <$1/month
cmo.tech: Python, FastAPI, Claude Sonnet 4, SQLite, Playwright, Resend, Telegram Bot, Make.com, Buffer API, Oracle Cloud (systemd)

espaluz.title: EspaLuz Stack
espaluz.subtitle: Emotionally Intelligent AI Companion — WhatsApp + Telegram + Social Automation
espaluz.desc: Bilingual AI counselor, relocation assistant, and cultural interpreter with family memory — serving expats, travelers, and locals across 21 Spanish-speaking countries. Neural voice messages (edge-tts), real-time translation EN/ES/RU, emotional intelligence (50+ states), OCR photo translation, practical help (banking, medical, schools, emergencies). Unified PostgreSQL memory via LangChain.
espaluz.traction: 3 bots live • 21-country localization • Neural voice • PayPal subscriptions • 7-platform social auto-posting via Influencer bot
espaluz.tech: Python, Flask, Claude Sonnet 4, Groq (Llama 3.3 70B), edge-tts, Whisper, LangChain, PostgreSQL, WhatsApp Cloud API, Telegram Bot API, Buffer, Make.com, Oracle Cloud (systemd)

algom.title: ALGOM Alpha
algom.subtitle: Web3 & Crypto Coach for Beginners — Post-Scam Era
algom.desc: AI-powered Web3 education bot for beginner traders — scam detection, risk management, trading psychology, and technical analysis basics. Autonomous paper trading (zero real money) with real-time data from 5 exchanges, honest reporting of wins and losses on X.
algom.traction: ~200 X followers • 40% educational content rotation • Paper trading with transparent results • Daily auto-posting
algom.tech: Node.js, Eliza OS, Claude Sonnet 4, Groq (Llama 3.3 70B), CCXT (5 exchanges), CoinGecko, Twitter API v2, Oracle Cloud (PM2)

section3.title: AIdeazz Ecosystem — The Vision
section3.missionLead: <aideazz>AIdeazz</aideazz> is an ecosystem of emotionally intelligent agents — born in Panama and supported by <isd>Innovation Smart District (ISD)</isd>. Our mission is to build conscious AI companions that amplify human potential through education, coaching, and trusted digital assistance.
section3.desc1: AIdeazz is a production ecosystem of context-aware AI agents — built in Panama and backed by Innovation Smart District (ISD). The platform combines persistent memory architectures, multi-model LLM routing, and emotional intelligence to deliver AI assistants that operate across education, automation, and personal productivity.
section3.desc2: Designed not to replace human judgment but to augment it — helping users acquire new skills, make better decisions, and operate faster through personalized AI that retains context over time.
section3.vision: The thesis: every person — professional or not — will eventually need a personal AI agent. Not a generic chatbot, but a persistent, evolving system that understands their context, remembers their history, adapts to real-life challenges, and compounds value over time.
